title: Kurdish-Style Ackee Crumble
description: A delightful breakfast dish blending the flavors of Kurdish cuisine with the Caribbean delicacy of ackee. A flaky, light crumble topping adds a satisfying crunch.

ingredients.name: Kurdish Spice Mix
ingredients.notes: Available at Middle Eastern markets or online

ingredients.name: Crumbles Topping
ingredients.notes: Mix of tangy, flaky, light, kurdish, ackee

ingredients.name: Milk
ingredients.notes: Whole milk or a non-dairy alternative

instructions: 2. In a large skillet, melt butter over medium heat. Add sugar and cook for 2-3 minutes.
3. Add ackee and cook until heated through.
4. In a separate bowl, mix together flour and Kurdish Spice Mix.
5. Add the crumbles topping to the flour mixture and mix until well combined.
6. Pour the milk into the skillet with the ackee mixture and stir to combine.
7. Top the ackee mixture with the crumbles topping.
8. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown.
9. Serve warm, garnished with additional crumbles topping if desired.
